conclusions.rationale: Limited crop-only correct-uncertainty recoveries occurred, but replacement is not supported as a reliable strategy because it removes full-image context and produces substantially more regressions than recoveries.
evidence: crop-only exact recoveries: 0 scenario-scale, 0 unique case-fields
crop-only correct-uncertainty recoveries: 6 scenario-scale, 2 unique case-fields (approved-wine-013:brand, approved-wine-054:brand)
crop-only scenario-scale regression instances: 43
crop-only unique case-field regressions: 15

conclusions.rationale: Bounded additive brand signal is supported on this adjudicated slice: two brand case-fields recover to correct uncertainty at 1.5x without any prior-correct brand regression.
evidence: 1.5x additive brand recoveries: 0 exact, 2 correct-uncertainty, 2 total acceptable
recovered case-fields: approved-wine-013:brand, approved-wine-054:brand
approved-wine-013:brand => targeted selected source: yes; duplicate corroborated: yes; new candidate: yes; new alternate: yes; ranking changed: yes; ambiguity changed: no
approved-wine-054:brand => targeted selected source: yes; duplicate corroborated: no; new candidate: yes; new alternate: yes; ranking changed: yes; ambiguity changed: no

conclusions.rationale: No additive alcohol selected-outcome recovery was observed on this adjudicated slice.
evidence: 1.5x additive alcohol recoveries: 0 exact, 0 correct-uncertainty, 0 total acceptable
additive alcohol prior-correct regressions: 1 scenario-scale

conclusions.rationale: Canonical rotation did not recover a selected outcome in the two applicable alcohol fields at any tested scale. The evidence remains too small for a broad universal claim.
evidence: rotated crop-only applicable alcohol case-fields at 1.5x: 2
rotated selected-outcome recoveries across crop-only and additive families: 0

conclusions.rationale: Scale changes affect a bounded subset of case-fields. The report separates beneficial, harmful, and failure-class-only movements relative to the original 1.5x benchmark without recommending a production scale.
evidence: Crop-only replacement / brand: improved 0, worsened 0, failure-class changes without selected-outcome improvement 4, unchanged 7
Crop-only replacement / alcohol: improved 0, worsened 1, failure-class changes without selected-outcome improvement 2, unchanged 9
Rotated crop-only replacement / brand: improved 0, worsened 0, failure-class changes without selected-outcome improvement 0, unchanged 0
Rotated crop-only replacement / alcohol: improved 0, worsened 0, failure-class changes without selected-outcome improvement 0, unchanged 2
Additive targeted evidence / brand: improved 0, worsened 0, failure-class changes without selected-outcome improvement 3, unchanged 8
Additive targeted evidence / alcohol: improved 0, worsened 1, failure-class changes without selected-outcome improvement 0, unchanged 11
Rotated additive targeted evidence / brand: improved 0, worsened 0, failure-class changes without selected-outcome improvement 0, unchanged 0
Rotated additive targeted evidence / alcohol: improved 0, worsened 0, failure-class changes without selected-outcome improvement 0, unchanged 2

conclusions.rationale: After the diagnostic-best targeted scenarios, remaining failures still separate into recognition/reconstruction, candidate-generation, filtering, ranking, and parser categories.
evidence: recognition/reconstruction failures remaining: 5
candidate-generation failures remaining: 0
candidate-filtering failures remaining: 10
candidate-ranking failures remaining: 0
parser failures remaining: 0

productionBoundaryProof.proofNote: All benchmark annotations, synthetic pass-kind adaptation, and additive scenario synthesis remain confined to src/fixtures/eval; production OCR planning, selection behavior, API/UI behavior, and geometry contracts are unchanged.
